Class DRDesignReport

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.DRDesignReport
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignReport, DesignTransformAccessor, Serializable
public class DRDesignReport extends Object implements DesignTransformAccessor, DRIDesignReport

DRDesignReport class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
